title: potentilla × aurulenta
intro: Potentilla × aurulenta, also known as golden potentilla, is a hybrid plant species within the Rosaceae family, bred for its vibrant golden foliage. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in flavonoids, which possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable medicinal plant. The health benefits of Potentilla × aurulenta include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, which can aid in the prevention of various diseases. Herbal preparations of Potentilla × aurulenta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support digestive health.
